creator: daniel.rapp@incabus.com
text:
Paste thrue SSH Secure Shell v.2.4.0 (build 161,163) in VI kills the session...Buffert problem?, works fine whit small texts but just dies when trying to insert larger texts...

How-To-Repeat: Use SSH Secure Shells Client (www.ssh.com) and connect to a FreeBSD 4.2 machine, open VI and try to paste a large text into it...(-=BANG=-)
